verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God gave a promise To His Bride in this last days Priests and kings He’s made us And forever we shall reign We’re following an eternal order Way beyond humanistic realm God lifting us to a higher place Only by His grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’re a living reality We are His Holy Word The substance of the shadow The fulfillment of His Word We’re a living reality We’re the mystery revealed Christ manifested in us He in us and we in Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our natural birth brought five senses To relate to natural things But by our new birth We received the sixth sense faith Faith the Holy Spirit Came in us to dwell again A circumcised people Greater works we’ll do again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Faith relates to Melchizedec And we are the faith Faith is the substance God in flesh again We are not on Mt. Sinai But now raised up to Mt. Zion Like our Father Abraham From the dust to the stars We were made
